items.name: notice
items.description: Inline feedback message with tone variants: success (emerald), alert (destructive), note (muted).

items.name: section-intro
items.description: Eyebrow + title + description header block for sections. Supports h2 or h3 title tag.

items.name: admin-form-actions
items.description: Flex row wrapper for admin form action buttons (submit, cancel, secondary actions).

items.name: admin-form-field
items.description: Admin form field wrapper with label, optional description, and input slot.

items.name: admin-page-shell
items.description: Admin page top-level structure: eyebrow, title, optional description and actions slot, content area with border-b separator.

items.name: admin-form-section
items.description: Card-based admin form section with optional eyebrow/title/description header separated from content.

items.name: empty
items.description: Compound empty state component: centered dashed container with optional icon, title, description, and content slots.

items.name: spinner
items.description: Minimal loading spinner using Loader2Icon with animate-spin and ARIA role="status".

items.name: item
items.description: Compound list-item component with optional media, content, title, description, actions, header, and footer slots. Supports default, outline, and muted variants.

items.name: field
items.description: Compound form field system with orientation variants, label, description, error deduplication, separator with optional label, fieldset, and legend. Requires Tailwind v4 container queries.

items.name: input-group
items.description: Compound input wrapper with inline and block addon slots, icon/text/button addons, borderless Input and Textarea sub-components, and full focus/invalid state handling.
